bird.name: 黑眉苇莺
bird.summary: The black-browed reed warbler (Acrocephalus bistrigiceps) is a marsh-warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It was formerly included in the…

relations.subject: 黑眉苇莺
relations.evidence: Like many other wetland birds, it is of conservation concern owing to habitat loss due to the destruction of native marsh vegetation and its replacement by rice paddies and fishponds."Group announces first Philippine sighting of bird species"
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
